- `outputs/agent-integration/review.md`

context_values.response.specify:
Wrote the durable artifacts at [agent-adapter.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77CVP7HD6QR463J374ZPDF/worktree/outputs/agent-integration/agent-adapter.md) and [review.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77CVP7HD6QR463J374ZPDF/worktree/outputs/agent-integration/review.md).

They conclude product should move into an implementation-family workflow next, not another upstream unblock. The important fresh repo truth is that the old robopoker-path blocker is stale: [crates/myosu-games/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77CVP7HD6QR463J374ZPDF/worktree/crates/myosu-games/Cargo.toml#L17) is already on pinned git deps, while [myosu-product.yaml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77CVP7HD6QR463J374ZPDF/worktree/fabro/programs/myosu-product.yaml#L15) still stops at `reviewed`, so the real gap is missing product implementation-family surfaces plus the missing `myosu-play` crate noted in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77CVP7HD6QR463J374ZPDF/worktree/Cargo.toml#L10).

Verification: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-agent-integration-target cargo test -p myosu-games --quiet` passed (`10` unit + `4` doctest), and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-agent-integration-target cargo test -p myosu-tui --quiet` passed (`82` passed, `2` ignored, `1` doctest).
